---
title: "IMU-GPS-ESKF Public API"
description: "Browse the [imu-gps-eskf](https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf) project's public API by [Groups](groups/) and [Types](types/)."
---

The public API can be browsed by [Groups](groups/) and [Types](types/).

- [Groups](groups/): free functions grouped by shared purpose.
- [Types](types/): public structs and classes.
